The golf invitational named for him awards a red cardigan sweater like the one he wore when charging with his army

Campbell Soup executive Donald E. Goerke was known as "the Daddy-O" of this brand

This man hired Henry Ginaca to make a machine that could trim & core pineapple & more than tripled its canning production
"Oh, dear! Oh, dear!... The house must have fallen on her. Whatever shall we do?"

Catalogue & review films you've seen on this app founded in 2011; it's been called Goodreads for movies

Definitely not what it sounds like! A urinator is one of these "who searches under water", perhaps for pearls

Under this 600s B.C. Athenian lawgiver, there were many capital crimes--stole an apple? Believe it or not, straight to death
One of the main centers of the Indus civilization along with Harappa, its hyphenated name is said to mean "mound of the dead"
